labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: For patients with eGFR <15 or on dialysis: DPP-4 inhibitors are more suitable glucose-lowering drugs. Can be used in advanced CKD when other agents are contraindicated.
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: DPP-4 inhibitors lower blood glucose with low risk of hypoglycemia but have not been shown to improve kidney or cardiovascular outcomes and should not be used in combination with GLP-1 RA.
